title: FDA Launches Unified Adverse Event Monitoring System
headline: FDA Launches Unified Adverse Event Monitoring System
key_facts: FDA has merged its fragmented adverse event tracking systems into a single unified database; New system consolidates vaccine side effects reporting (previously separate) with drug adverse events; Described as addressing the agency's "fragmented" safety surveillance architecture; No specific launch d

title: Eli Lilly Dominates Q4 2025; Projects Strong 2026 Growth

title: Novo Nordisk Valuation Collapse
headline: Novo Nordisk Valuation Collapse
key_facts: Novo Holdings' assets fell **by one-third** in 2025; Decline attributed to Novo Nordisk's value falling substantially; No specific dollar figures provided in excerpt

title: UCB's Bimzelx Beats AbbVie's Skyrizi in Head-to-Head PsA Trial
headline: UCB's Bimzelx Beats AbbVie's Skyrizi in Head-to-Head PsA Trial
key_facts: Bimzelx (UCB) demonstrated **superiority** over Skyrizi (AbbVie) in psoriatic arthritis trial; First approved biologic to show superiority over an IL-23 blocker in PsA; Analysts remain "unsure how commercially impactful the results will be"; No specific endpoint data or percentage improvements provi

title: Biogen Builds Case for Spinraza Successor
headline: Biogen Builds Case for Spinraza Successor
key_facts: Fresh data presented for Spinraza successor program; Spinraza (nusinersen) is Biogen's SMA therapy, launched 2016, facing competition from gene therapies; Specific data points not provided in excerpts

title: Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli Competition from Legend's Carvykti
headline: Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli Competition from Legend's Carvykti
key_facts: Legend Biotech "sloughs off" competitive threat from J&J's Tecvayli to its Carvykti product; Both are BCMA-targeted therapies for multiple myeloma; J&J partnered on Carvykti; Tecvayli is wholly-owned competitor; No specific sales or trial data in excerpt

title: Pfizer Shuts Down Ignite R&D Services Unit
headline: Pfizer Shuts Down Ignite R&D Services Unit
key_facts: Pfizer closing Ignite, its R&D services unit for small biotechs; Unit provided lab services and support to emerging companies; Closure timing and employee count not specified

title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Closes Upsized $747.5M Offering
headline: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Closes Upsized $747.5M Offering
key_facts: $747.5 million** public offering closed; Offering was upsized (original size not stated); Underwriters' option to purchase additional shares exercised in full; Xenon is neuroscience-focused biopharma (Nasdaq: XENE)

title: Dianthus Therapeutics Closes Upsized $719M Offering
headline: Dianthus Therapeutics Closes Upsized $719M Offering
key_facts: $719 million** underwritten public offering closed; Offering was upsized; Underwriters' option exercised in full

title: BioNTech Co-Founders Departing to Launch New mRNA Startup
headline: BioNTech Co-Founders Departing to Launch New mRNA Startup
key_facts: Ugur Sahin and Özlem Türeci stepping down from BioNTech; Couple directed BioNTech's "rise to prominence" with COVID vaccine; Will helm unnamed new company dedicated to mRNA discovery; No financial terms or timeline provided

title: Blackstone Provides $400M to Teva for TL1A Program
headline: Blackstone Provides $400M to Teva for TL1A Program
key_facts: $400 million** from Blackstone to Teva; Supports TL1A program partnered with Sanofi; TL1A is emerging IBD/immunology target (competing with Roivant, others)

title: Breakout Ventures Closes $114M Fund
headline: Breakout Ventures Closes $114M Fund
key_facts: $114 million** fund closed; Plans for approximately **20 investments**; Average check size: ~$5.7 million per investment

title: Mineralys Therapeutics NDA Accepted for Lorundrostat

title: Biotech Sector Weakness
headline: Biotech Sector Weakness
key_facts: Biotechnology sector: **-2.50% day return** (March 12); YTD return: **+0.16%** (essentially flat); Broader healthcare sector: **-1.59% day**, +0.78% YTD; S&P 500: -1.52% day, +3.24% YTD; Market cap biotech sector: **12.62% of healthcare**, total healthcare $7.293 trillion; Thermo Fisher (TMO): -4.00

title: Sandoz Reorganization Ahead of "Golden Decade for Biosimilars"
headline: Sandoz Reorganization Ahead of "Golden Decade for Biosimilars"
key_facts: Sandoz reorganizing structure; Sanofi shedding Latin America generics business (related coverage); Sandoz positioning for "golden decade" of biosimilar growth

title: Evotec Plans Up to 800 Job Cuts, Four Site Closures
headline: Evotec Plans Up to 800 Job Cuts, Four Site Closures
key_facts: Up to 800 job cuts** planned; Four site closures**; Part of "next phase of reorganization"

title: SERVIER / DAY ONE BIOPHARMACEUTICALS ACQUISITION (CONTINUATION)
headline: Follow-up coverage of Servier's $2.5B acquisition of Day One Biopharmaceuticals and its Ojemda pediatric brain tumor franchise
